name: Master Chef - VR Cooking Game Simulator

reviews.review_description: False advertisement. The first image shown after the video is for another cooking game. I payed gor this game thinking it was a whole other cooking game and hot disappointed. Also, I couldn't even play the game. It was just a huge empty kitchen and it wouldn't let me do anything.

So I downloaded this game because I love cooking games and I couldn’t even play this game. Its so laggy i couldn’t grab or place things without it flying everywhere. I couldn’t even move very much. I deem this game unplayable. Do not buy
Game was laggy, when I tried placing an item it’ll clip through the floor or counter and I couldn’t get it back, I just quit the game

reviews.review_title: how do i request a refund
reviews.review_description: i’d like to request a refund. it does not work, this game is very glitchy and nothing seems to actually play
Tried several times to load the game and it did not work. Please respond back.
